# Deploy TeamX - Appwrite on Railway

Deploy Team Collaboration with Appwrite, ElevenLabs, Resend & Firecrawl

[![Deploy on Railway](https://railway.com/button.svg)](https://railway.com/template/teamx-appwrite)

## About

TeamX - Appwrite is a versatile team collaboration app that combines real-time chat, activity feeds, and team management features with a smooth React/Next.js frontend connected to a powerful Appwrite backend hosted in the cloud. It’s designed to keep teams organized and engaged with tools like polls, audio summaries, announcements, and more — all in one easy-to-use platform! 🎯✨

Hosting TeamX - Appwrite involves deploying your frontend app on Railway while connecting it to the cloud-hosted Appwrite backend for databases, file storage, and authentication. The app uses Railway-hosted serverless functions for powerful integrations like email broadcasting (Resend), AI-generated audio (ElevenLabs), and content summarization (Firecrawl Extract). Setting up environment variables, configuring API keys, and deploying on Railway lets you easily scale your app while keeping everything secure and maintainable. The seamless integration of frontend, backend, and AI features makes for an efficient, collaborative team workspace! 🌐⚙️

## What gets deployed

| Service | Source | Type |
|---------|--------|------|
| Resend | `ghcr.io/railwayapp/function-bun:1.2.16` | Web service |
| OpenAI+ElevenLabs TTS | `ghcr.io/railwayapp/function-bun:1.2.16` | Web service |
| Firecrawl Extract | `ghcr.io/railwayapp/function-bun:1.2.16` | Web service |
| TeamX | [akdeepankar/TeamX](https://github.com/akdeepankar/TeamX) | Web service |

## Environment variables

| Variable | Service | Default | Description |
| --------- | ------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `RESEND_FROM` | Resend | onboarding@resend.dev | onboarding@resend.dev is the Default. |
| `RESEND_API_KEY` | Resend | (secret) | visit resend.com to get the API Key. |
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | OpenAI+ElevenLabs TTS | (secret) | Get the API Key from OpenAI Platform. |
| `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY` | OpenAI+ElevenLabs TTS | (secret) | Get the API Key from Eleven Labs. |
| `ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID` | OpenAI+ElevenLabs TTS | - | Get the Voice ID from Eleven Labs. |
| `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` | Firecrawl Extract | (secret) | visit firecrawl.dev to get the API Key. |
| `APPWRITE_API_KEY` | TeamX | (secret) | Get the API Key in the Appwrite Project. |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APPWRITE_DB_ID` | TeamX | - | Get the ID in the Appwrite Project. |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APPWRITE_ENDPOINT` | TeamX | - | Get the Value in the Appwrite Project. |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_AUDIO_SERVICE_URL` | TeamX | - | Deployed link of the ElevenLabs TTS |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APPWRITE_BUCKET_ID` | TeamX | - | Get the Value in the Appwrite Project. |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_RESEND_SERVICE_URL` | TeamX | - | Deployed link of the Resend Service |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APPWRITE_PROJECT_ID` | TeamX | - | Get the Value in the Appwrite Project. |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_FIRECRAWL_SERVICE_URL` | TeamX | - | Deployed link of the Firecrawl |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APPWRITE_OUTBOX_COLL_ID` | TeamX | - | Get the Value in the Appwrite Project Collection. |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APPWRITE_MESSAGES_COLL_ID` | TeamX | - | Get the Value in the Appwrite Project Collection. |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APPWRITE_ACTIVITIES_COLL_ID` | TeamX | - | Get the Value in the Appwrite Project Collection. |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APPWRITE_JOIN_TEAM_FUNCTION_ID` | TeamX | - | Get the Value in the Appwrite Project Function. |

## Configuration

- **Start command:** `./run.sh `
- **Networking:** Public domain with automatic HTTPS
- **Start command:** `./run.sh `
- **Start command:** `./run.sh `
- **Start command:** `npm run start`

**Category:** Starters · **Languages:** JavaScript, Python, CSS

[View on Railway →](https://railway.com/template/teamx-appwrite)
